articles.title: Apple and Major League Baseball announce August “Friday Night Baseball” schedule
articles.summary: Apple's collaboration with Major League Baseball to stream "Friday Night Baseball" every week in August marks a significant expansion of the tech giant's foray into live sports, enhancing its content offerings and potentially reshaping how fans engage with baseball. This initiative not only elevates the viewing experience but also underscores the growing importance of streaming platforms in the sports broadcasting landscape.

articles.title: Why China is finally letting AI firms buy the Nvidia H200
articles.summary: China's decision to allow select AI firms to purchase Nvidia's H200 graphics processing units marks a significant shift in its tech policy, potentially accelerating advancements in artificial intelligence and reshaping the competitive landscape amid ongoing U.S.-China tensions. This breakthrough not only signals a thaw in the chip export standoff but also underscores the critical role of advanced technology in national strategy and economic growth.

articles.title: GeForce NOW Turns Up the Heat With New GeForce RTX 5080-Powered Toronto Server
articles.summary: NVIDIA's GeForce NOW has launched a new server powered by the GeForce RTX 5080 in Toronto, significantly enhancing cloud gaming performance and accessibility for users in the region, while also expanding its game offerings. This breakthrough not only elevates the gaming experience but also reinforces the growing trend of high-performance cloud gaming solutions.

articles.title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
articles.summary: GPT-5.6 has emerged as the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot, significantly enhancing AI capabilities across key applications like Word, Excel, and PowerPoint, enabling users to achieve faster and higher-quality work. This breakthrough not only streamlines productivity but also sets a new standard for AI integration in everyday business tools.

articles.title: Why AI race with US is a ‘knockout game’ China cannot afford to lose
articles.summary: China faces an urgent imperative to transform its innovation ecosystem to maintain technological sovereignty and national security in a critical AI competition with the US, as experts warn that failure to embrace open-source AI could lead to a devastating loss in this high-stakes "knockout game." This shift is essential not only for economic resilience but also for safeguarding the nation's strategic interests in an increasingly digital world.

articles.title: Africa’s cultural landmarks: rock-hewn churches of Lalibela, Ethiopia
articles.summary:
• The rock-hewn churches of Lalibela challenge conventional architectural norms by being sculpted from solid rock rather than constructed from individual materials.  
• This unique method of creation symbolizes a profound spiritual connection, merging artistry with divine aspiration.  
• The churches serve as a testament to human ingenuity, showcasing the ability to transform the immovable into sacred spaces.  
• Lalibela stands as a cultural beacon, reflecting Ethiopia's rich history and the resilience of its people through centuries of faith and artistry.  
• These structures invite contemplation on the relationship between nature, spirituality, and the human desire to create lasting legacies.

articles.title: ChatGPT is now a partner for your most ambitious work
articles.summary: OpenAI's ChatGPT Work introduces a groundbreaking AI agent capable of seamlessly integrating with various applications and files to actively manage projects over extended periods, transforming ambitious goals into tangible results. This innovation not only enhances productivity but also redefines the role of AI as a proactive collaborator in the workplace.

articles.title: GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty
articles.summary: OpenAI's introduction of the GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty program represents a groundbreaking initiative aimed at enhancing AI safety and reliability by incentivizing the identification of vulnerabilities in its advanced models, a crucial step in ensuring responsible AI deployment in sensitive biological applications. This proactive approach not only underscores OpenAI's commitment to ethical AI development but also sets a new standard for industry practices in safeguarding against potential risks associated with powerful AI technologies.

articles.title: GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition
articles.summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 introduces a revolutionary leap in AI performance, delivering enhanced intelligence from each token and superior cost efficiency, empowering users to tackle their most challenging tasks with unprecedented capability and scalability. This breakthrough not only redefines the potential of AI in various applications but also positions it as an essential tool for ambitious projects across industries.

articles.title: How to offset your brain
articles.summary:
• Cognitive biases shape our perceptions and decisions, often leading us astray from objective reality.  
• Mindfulness practices can serve as a powerful antidote, enabling us to recognize and mitigate these biases.  
• By cultivating awareness, we can challenge our ingrained thought patterns and foster more rational thinking.  
• The journey towards offsetting our brain's biases is not just personal; it invites a collective evolution in understanding and empathy.  
• Embracing mindfulness is not merely a mental exercise; it is a profound philosophical shift towards greater clarity and intentionality in our lives.

articles.title: Chinese AI labs pursue custom chips to lower costs but heavy upfront investment a risk
articles.summary: Chinese AI labs are shifting towards developing custom chips to enhance hardware-software integration and reduce long-term costs, a move that reflects a global trend but poses significant risks due to the substantial initial investments required. This strategic pivot could reshape the competitive landscape of AI technology, emphasizing the critical balance between innovation and financial sustainability.

articles.title: Shares soar as recently-listed Zhipu AI and Iluvatar CoreX launch secondary placements
articles.summary: Zhipu AI and Iluvatar CoreX Semiconductor have achieved a remarkable surge in their stock prices following the announcement of secondary share placements aimed at raising billions for advanced hardware and research, signaling strong investor confidence in the future of AI and semiconductor technology in China. This breakthrough not only highlights the growing importance of AI development but also underscores the potential for significant advancements in the tech sector fueled by substantial financial backing.
